title: Little Fish: Really Siding With The Baddies
content:
James, Andy and Anna discuss YOUR facts including huge holes and dangerous materials. James and Andy argue over a TikTokker who doesn't exist. And we name eight more Friend of the Podcast custodians.

Visit nosuchthingasafish.com for news about live shows, merchandise and more episodes.

Edited by James Harkin

Produced by Leying Lee

Team includes Jack Chambers, Tara Dorrell, Joe Mayo and Ethan Ruparelia
